frame_analyses.description: Instructor standing, no trainer visible yet. Appears to be introductory/explanatory phase.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Preparing to discuss or demonstrate technique

frame_analyses.description: Instructor holding pre-tied ligating loop with applicator, gesturing to explain deployment mechanics. Loop clearly visible with green band (marker) on suture tail.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Showing proper grip on applicator, demonstrating how loop will be deployed around target

frame_analyses.description: Instructor demonstrating approach of applicator to foam appendage (visible in lower frame area). Explaining positioning relative to target structure.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating correct angle and alignment for successful loop placement

frame_analyses.description: Holding applicator with loop extended, showing the mechanics of how loop opens around the appendage. Verbal explanation inferred from hand gestures.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear demonstration of loop opening and target engagement

frame_analyses.description: Instructor demonstrating cinching mechanism by pulling suture tail with the green marker band visible. Shows tension application.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating proper cinching technique with controlled tension to secure loop

frame_analyses.description: Holding applicator showing the suture tail post-cinching. Explaining final steps of securing the knot.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper tail handling and knot verification

frame_analyses.description: Close-up demonstration of applicator mechanism, showing the knot pusher and suture components.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Detailed view of instrument components and their function

frame_analyses.description: Instructor holding completed task setup, demonstrating proper positioning of all elements. Appears to be summary of key teaching points.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final review of correct technique and positioning

score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable — instructional video (no performance to score)

confidence_rationale: Video clearly classified as instructional demonstration. No actual task performance visible — this is an expert explaining and demonstrating the Endoloop technique with narration-style presentation.
cannot_determine: Completion time — no actual task performance, only explanation
Penalties — no performance-based errors to assess
FLS score — instructional content is not scored per protocol

demonstrated_techniques: Proper grip and orientation of ligating loop applicator
Approach angle and alignment to foam appendage target
Loop deployment mechanics — how applicator opens the loop around the target
Cinching mechanics — applying tension via suture tail to secure the loop
Knot pusher function and suture tail management
Positioning of loop at the marked line on the appendage
verbal_cues: Instructor uses hand gestures and positional demonstration to explain each phase
Emphasis on proper alignment before deployment
Demonstration of tension control during cinching phase
common_errors_addressed: Incorrect applicator angle leading to off-target loop placement
Insufficient tension during cinching (loop may slip)
Applying tension too quickly (may cause loop to tangle or appendage to avulse)
Failing to position loop at the marked line

content_summary: This is a comprehensive instructional video where an expert surgeon demonstrates the correct technique for the Endoloop task. The instructor methodically walks through each phase: equipment overview, target approach, loop deployment mechanics, cinching procedure, and final verification. The demonstration emphasizes proper positioning, controlled tension application, and anatomically safe technique. Suitable for training novice and intermediate surgeons in FLS Endoloop fundamentals.
